def positive_langchain_chain_built_per_request():
    rule_id = "langchain_chain_built_per_request"
    family = "mlops"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "LangChain or LlamaIndex prompt and chain wiring rebuilt on each request path."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
